parsed_review.summary: Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) of CP00-675 across registry.js, service.js, validators.js, model.test.js, both contract JSON projections, scripts/validate-rp22-external-integrations-i-contract.mjs, the manifest, and all review/closeout artifacts. The CP00-675 binding, requirement distribution (ui6/impl63/claude_review6/failure_recovery4/test20/contract31/security_audit16/hermes4), phase/micro/section coverage, and the 150-unit range RP22.P02.M09.S09-RP22.P03.M06.S12 match the baseline and are enforced by validateExternalIntegrationsICp675Coverage and the Phase3FoundationBridge descriptor validator, with passing CP00-675 model tests. Every case-set row is descriptor_only with runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, and raw_payload_included=false; freezeCp675Result plus the reused no-write attestation keep writes_product_state, secret/token persistence, provider calls, and permission/audit/Hermes/Claude/persistence runtimes false with no_real_data=true. No secret or real-data leakage found in the changed source. Claude remains read-only and non-final (promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claude_is_final_approval=false); Hermes packets are descriptor-only with runtime_receipt_emitted=false and are used only for deterministic review-packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. The manifest is honestly in_progress / production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false pending this review; command-evidence.json reports the 22-command pre-review matrix at exit 0 (agent-reported, not re-run under this read-only review). The only prior pack-level Claude runs (raw-output.json and invalid-attempt-01) were 0-byte/terminated (status 143) and were correctly quarantined as invalid_review per CP178+ hardening; this read-only review is the valid superseding pack-level review. No P0/P1/P2 issues; two P3 informational notes. Pack closeout and this CP's goal closeout are not blocked.

findings.title: Prior automated review runs were 0-byte/terminated and correctly quarantined as invalid; this review supersedes them
findings.details: raw-output.json and invalid-attempt-01-raw-output.json both record status 143 (SIGTERM, ~10.5 min run) with stdout_bytes=0. review-receipt.json normalized them to status 'invalid_review', valid_review=false, closeout_eligible=false, invalid_reason 'stdout_0_bytes; required_field_error: parsed_review missing'. claude-review-result.json still shows exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false and parsed_review.overall_verdict=PENDING, and construction-inspection.json/adjudication.md are PENDING accordingly. These are transient CLI failures, not pack defects, and the CP178+ hardening correctly refused to count the empty output as valid review evidence.
findings.recommendation: Treat this read-only review as the single valid pack-level C22 review; keep the 0-byte/terminated runs as quarantined invalid_review_attempts (do not count toward the gate). Re-normalize claude-review-result.json, construction-inspection.json, and adjudication.md from this review before adjudication/commit so exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run resolves to true.
findings.post_review_disposition: Resolved / non-blocking — invalid attempts correctly excluded by hardening; this review supersedes them.

findings.title: production_ready is descriptor-scoped; external-integration runtime stays closed (runtime_ready=false)
findings.details: production_ready_flag is 'external_integrations_i_phase3_foundation_bridge_descriptor_verified' and the manifest sets runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer='descriptor', runtime_opened=false. The descriptor/validator/test stack (service.js:2017, validators.js:1160-1214, model.test.js:472) enforces descriptor_only, runtime_execution=false, claude_is_final_approval=false, and all provider/OAuth/sync/e-sign/webhook/permission/audit/persistence/Hermes/Claude runtimes closed. No over-claim detected: a passing review means the descriptor bridge is verified, not that external-integration runtime executes in production.
findings.recommendation: Preserve the descriptor-scoped meaning of production_ready; opening any RP22 external-integration runtime must remain gated behind human final approval in a later pack per the stated authority boundary. No change required for CP00-675.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational — consistent with authority boundary and runtime_ready=false; no action required.
